title: Kuro’s Plan Against Kaya Is Revealed
description: On pages 15–18, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: This isn't the USSP- San that I used to know...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Then I'll have to make you come with me by force!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I'm not lying! Everything I've said is the truth!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Please believe what I'm telling you!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Stupid brat! We won't let you get away this time!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: How is it possible for me to believe you like this?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Get out of here! Or else I will shoot you...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But... He was hurting you, Ojou- SAMA...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: every- body, he went that way!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: usopp, you're not going to get away!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Ah! Ojou- Sama, are you alright?

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
